assertions.title: No layout helper functions in scene lib
Scene lib contains only data types and serialization

steps.action: grep all pub fn/struct/enum declarations in scene/lib.rs
steps.expected: Only struct/enum definitions, SceneWriter/SceneReader/DoubleWriter/DoubleReader, diff_scenes, build_parent_map, abs_bounds, constants, bitflags macro
steps.observed: All pub declarations are: Color/Node/TextRun/ShapedGlyph/Content structs+enums, SceneWriter methods (serialization: push_data, push_shaped_glyphs, push_text_runs, alloc_node, etc.), SceneReader methods (deserialization: data, nodes, shaped_glyphs, text_runs), DoubleWriter/DoubleReader methods, build_parent_map, abs_bounds, diff_scenes, fnv1a hash, constants. No text shaping, glyph metric computation, or layout position calculation.

assertions.title: Scene lib has no alloc-heavy layout computation

steps.action: grep Vec|alloc in scene/lib.rs to check remaining alloc usage
steps.expected: alloc usage limited to diff_scenes internals
steps.observed: alloc usage: extern crate alloc, use alloc::vec::Vec, alloc_node (scene graph management), diff_scenes (Vec for damage rects). No layout-related Vec allocation.

steps.action: grep all 5 layout helper function names in services/core/*.rs
steps.observed: all 5 found in services/core/scene_state.rs: byte_to_line_col (line 358), layout_mono_lines (line 388), line_bytes_for_run (line 457), scroll_runs (line 473), bytes_to_shaped_glyphs (line 504)

assertions.title: Layout helper signatures preserved

steps.action: Extract full signatures of all 5 functions from services/core/scene_state.rs
steps.expected: Exact match with original signatures: layout_mono_lines(text: &[u8], chars_per_line: usize, line_height: i32, color: u32, advance: i32, font_size: i32), byte_to_line_col(text: &[u8], byte_offset: usize, chars_per_line: usize) -> (usize, usize), scroll_runs(runs: Vec<TextRun>, scroll_lines: usize, line_height: i32, viewport_height: i32), line_bytes_for_run(text: &[u8], run: &TextRun) -> &[u8], bytes_to_shaped_glyphs(text: &[u8], advance: i32) -> Vec<ShapedGlyph>
steps.observed: 2 of 5 match (byte_to_line_col, line_bytes_for_run). 3 have type changes: layout_mono_lines (line_height: i32→i16, color: u32→Color, advance: i32→u16, font_size: i32→u16), scroll_runs (scroll_lines: usize→u32, line_height: i32→u32), bytes_to_shaped_glyphs (advance: i32→u16)

assertions.issues: 3 of 5 function signatures differ from the stated originals. Type narrowing occurred (i32→i16/u16/u32, u32→Color struct, usize→u32). These appear to be intentional refinements aligned with TextRun/Node field type narrowing in the scene graph data types. The assertion's stated 'original signatures' may reflect a pre-refactoring snapshot. All 1462 tests pass with these signatures, so behavior is preserved. The assertion criteria ('exact same parameter types') is not met for layout_mono_lines, scroll_runs, and bytes_to_shaped_glyphs.

steps.observed: All 3 types found: ContentType defined in fallback.rs:22, FallbackChain defined in fallback.rs:49, TypographyConfig defined in typography.rs:35. Full implementations present with for_content_type factory method.

assertions.title: Core uses fonts crate not shaping

steps.observed: 5 matches, all in doc comments (//! and ///) describing the domain concept of 'text shaping' — a standard typography term. Zero code references to old shaping crate.

steps.expected: extern crate fonts, no extern crate shaping
steps.observed: extern crate alloc, extern crate scene, extern crate fonts. No extern crate shaping.
use fonts::rasterize::AxisValue, use fonts::{shape, Feature, ShapedGlyph}, use fonts::rasterize::AxisValue

assertions.issues: Note: grep 'shaping' returns 5 matches in doc comments. The assertion evidence criterion ('grep shaping returns 0') is technically not met, but all matches are domain terminology in comments, not code references to the old crate. The assertion's intent (no code references to old shaping crate) is fully satisfied.

steps.action: grep -rn 'use fonts::' in system/test/tests/ to confirm new imports
steps.observed: 20+ matches across shaping.rs and unicode.rs, all using 'use fonts::' — confirms migration from shaping to fonts crate.

frictions.description: VAL-CORE-004 evidence criterion says 'grep shaping returns 0' but the word 'shaping' appears in doc comments as a domain concept (text shaping). The evidence criterion should be 'grep extern crate shaping\|use shaping::' for precision.
frictions.resolution: Verified no code references exist; all 5 matches are doc comments. Assessed intent (code imports) rather than strict grep count.

frictions.description: VAL-CORE-002 original signatures listed in the assertion appear to be from a pre-refactoring state. The actual TextRun/Node types use i16/u16 fields, so function signatures were narrowed to match. The assertion may need updating to reflect the post-refactoring expected signatures.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 7 passed, 1 failed (VAL-CORE-002: 3 of 5 function signatures have type narrowing changes vs stated originals — likely intentional refinements, all tests pass).
